text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Wait... I lost? How could that be?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
What could have happened? Wasn't<n>luck working
in my favor? Just...<n>what?!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
This can't be right. It has to be a trick.<n>I mean, this
can't really be<n>happening. I have a destiny...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: What's going on, Trainer? I must stillbe asleep. This is all just a terriblenightmare, right?!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
It can't be real! I thought I'd been<n>reborn... This
means I haven't<n>changed one bit...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Where has my luck gone?! Is it in<n>hibernation or
something?!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Wake up! Please, I'm begging you!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
If the gods have deserted me, then<n>what should I...
I... Waaaah!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
A worried Silence Suzuka tries<n>comforting her, but
I gently turn her<n>down, sensing this isn't the right
time. Matikanefukukitaru continues to<n>cry.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I tell her that our next goal is the<n>Takarazuka
Kinen. She doesn't<n>respond.
